posts.authorHeadline: Comments have been turned off on this post. You can still react or repost it.
posts.content:
Myth vs. Reality
MYTH:
You should only hire freelance talent when you're overwhelmed.
REALITY:
The smartest companies plan ahead.
They bring in freelance support before workloads become unmanageable.
That keeps projects moving, protects employee morale, and prevents burnout before it starts.
Planning ahead is always easier than reacting later, let’s set up a call and chat more!
#clutch #hiringfirm #firm

posts.authorHeadline: Senior Software Engineer · Technical Product Owner
posts.content:
There's never been a better time to be a solo developer.

AI tooling means one person can now cover the ground that used to take a small team. 

I've had a great time getting back into freelance software development this past year. I love the variety of problems I get to solve and people I get to meet versus working full time for a single company.

If your business needs help but isn't looking for a full-time hire, and you need to:

- Prototype a new app/website
- Overhaul, optimize, or polish your app's user experience
- Automate repetitive workflows with AI
- Fix annoying issues that keep being deprioritized

I can help.

Send a DM or comment below and let's set up a call. Also happy to catch up just because!

posts.content:
🚀 **I’m Hiring | Freelance E-commerce Website Developer**

I’m looking for a talented freelance e-commerce website developer to build a modern, user-friendly online store from scratch.

What I’m looking for:

* Experience building e-commerce websites
* Strong UX/UI design skills with a focus on creating a seamless customer journey
* Clean, modern, responsive, and mobile-friendly design
* Secure payment gateway integration
* Product catalog and inventory setup
* Basic SEO optimization
* Strong communication skills and the ability to meet deadlines
* Knowledge of AI tools that can enhance the customer experience, such as AI chatbots, personalized product recommendations, or smart search

To apply, please send your portfolio and previous e-commerce projects to:

Info@untnaturals.com

If you’re interested or know someone who would be a great fit, please send me a message.
